old_value: {"id":"bmw-parser-generalization-k1r","title":"Generalize PDF parser to handle multiple paystub formats","description":"The PDF parser uses rigid regex patterns that only recognize one paystub format. Need to support common variations: ADP, Paychex, Gusto, Workday, etc. Handle different label names (Total Earnings vs Gross Pay, FWT vs Federal Tax), different date formats, and tabular vs labeled layouts.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"brendan.whitney@faraday.io","created_at":"2026-03-14T19:18:45Z","created_by":"Brendan Whitney","updated_at":"2026-03-14T19:18:45Z"}

new_value: Generalized PDF parser: broadened regex patterns, columnar layout support, 11 new test cases, real paystub fixture. Verified working with real paystubs.
